creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
Created attachment 183984
libco.shar

Libco is a c/c++ coroutine library that is widely used in WeChat services. It
has been running on tens of thousands of machines since 2013. By linking with
libco, you can easily transform synchronous back-end service into coroutine
service. The coroutine service will provide out-standing concurrency compare to
multi-thread approach. With the system hook, You can easily coding in
synchronous way but asynchronous executed.

You can also use co_create/co_resume/co_yield interfaces to create asynchronous
back-end service. These interface will give you more control of coroutines.

By libco copy-stack mode, you can easily build a back-end service support tens
of millions of tcp connection.

WWW: https://github.com/Tencent/libco

looks fine.
